report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides covering DeFi insurance protocols and distributed validator technology (DVT), filling high-priority content gaps identified in the existing 531-page site.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: DeFi Insurance: DeFi TVL exceeds $1T but less than 2% is insured. Nexus Mutual leads with $425M TVL (76% share), $18M+ in claims paid. InsurAce ($150M TVL) strong in depeg coverage. Unslashed leads coverage capacity at $700M+. Neptune Mutual pioneering parametric (auto-payout) insurance.

Distributed Validator Technology (DVT): Obol Network has $2B staked (~600K ETH, ranked 15th on Ethereum), targeting 10% of all staked ETH by end of 2026. SSV Network has 4M+ ETH staked with 1,000+ operators. Both integrated with Lido Simple DVT Module. DVT-Lite emerging as simplified alternative.
Gap analysis: Insurance and staking infrastructure were identified as two of the highest-priority content gaps across degen0x's 242 learn guides and 111 tool pages.

sections.title: Content Created
items: DeFi Insurance Protocols Guide 2026 (~3200 words, 14 min read): Covers Nexus Mutual, InsurAce, Unslashed, Neptune Mutual, Etherisc. 8 sections including coverage types, how to buy insurance, real claim examples ($5M FTX payout, $2.4M Euler hack), comparison table, and risks. 6 FAQs.

Distributed Validator Technology (DVT) Guide 2026 (~3200 words, 14 min read): Covers SSV Network vs Obol Network head-to-head, how DVT works (threshold cryptography), Lido Simple DVT Module in production, DVT-Lite explained, risks and limitations. 6 FAQs.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: DeFi Insurance: Title 'DeFi Insurance Protocols Guide 2026: Nexus Mutual, InsurAce & More | degen0x'. Target keywords: DeFi insurance, Nexus Mutual, smart contract insurance. Article + FAQ schemas. 12 keywords in metadata.

DVT Guide: Title 'Distributed Validator Technology (DVT) Guide 2026: SSV Network vs Obol | degen0x'. Target keywords: distributed validator technology, DVT, SSV Network, Obol. Article + FAQ schemas. 12 keywords in metadata.

Both pages: layout.tsx with Metadata export (title, description, keywords, openGraph article type with publishedTime, twitter card). StructuredData component with Article + FAQ JSON-LD in page.tsx. Breadcrumb navigation. Internal links to 6-7 related pages each.
Both slugs added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts

sections.title: Build Verification
items: TypeScript: No errors in new files (pre-existing @types/web conflicts in node_modules only)
All 4 files verified: export default present, valid file sizes (29-30KB page.tsx, ~1.8KB layout.tsx)
No interactive components needed — both are static learn guides following the existing inline-data card/table pattern
